title: AI won’t bring back era of rapid growth, says Nobel Prize winner
description: A Nobel Prize-winning economist has warned that artificial intelligence will not return Western economies to the era of rapid productivity growth, which may be gone forever.

title: IIM Bangalore to open campus in Indonesia, announces PM Modi; hails bilateral pacts "driven by technology" in AI, space
description: India and Indonesia signed major agreements to boost cooperation in artificial intelligence, digital infrastructure, startups, and space research. The two countries also announced the establishment of an IIM Bangalore campus in Indonesia, strengthening educational, technological, and youth partnerships during Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit.

title: Elon Musk's xAI Rebrands To SpaceXAI, Unveils New Logo
description: Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company xAI has officially become SpaceXAI after completing its integration with SpaceX. The company changed its X handle and unveiled a new logo, while AI products including Grok will now operate under the SpaceXAI name. The move follows SpaceX’s acquisition of xAI earlier this year.

title: Season 3 launches its season finale episode featuring Sriram Santhanam, Head of Startups, AWS India
description: New Delhi [India], July 7: India's startup ecosystem is entering a defining phase where innovation is no longer just about building fast, but building intelligently at scale. As artificial intelligence moves from experimentation to real-world deployment and cloud infrastructure becomes more deeply embedded in business strategy, startups are shifting towards leaner, more efficient and globally competitive models. With increasing access to advanced technologies and stronger ecosystem support, founders across the country are now equipped to transform bold ideas into scalable and future-ready enterprises.
